title: Workplace head injury after pipe fell from derrick
description: Work-related head injury after a pipe fell from the derrick onto the patient's head while working on a drill rig. Denied loss of consciousness.
sourceExcerpt: Patient information. DOB 09/29/1978. D.O.B. 09/29/1978. DATE OF SERVICE: 02/02/2019. Work-related head injury after a pipe fell from the derrick onto the patient's head while working on a drill rig.

title: ER presentation with head, neck, left shoulder pain
description: Emergency Department presentation with head pain, neck pain, and left shoulder pain after the injury.
sourceExcerpt: Patient information. DOB 09/29/1978. DATE OF SERVICE: 02/02/2019. Emergency Department presentation with head pain, neck pain, and left shoulder pain after the injury.

title: Left scalp/periorbital injury findings
description: Exam found left scalp swelling and periorbital bruising around the left eye.
sourceExcerpt: Patient information. DOB 09/29/1978. DATE OF SERVICE: 02/02/2019. Exam found left scalp swelling and periorbital bruising around the left eye.

title: CT head result
description: CT head with soft tissue swelling and no intracranial hemorrhage.
sourceExcerpt: Patient information. DOB 09/29/1978. DATE OF SERVICE: 02/02/2019. CT head with soft tissue swelling and no intracranial hemorrhage. Electronically signed by Sarah Orrin MD. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.

title: C2 fracture imaging result
description: CT cervical spine showed a nondisplaced C2 facet and lamina fracture.
sourceExcerpt: Patient information. DOB 09/29/1978. DATE OF SERVICE: 02/02/2019. CT cervical spine showed a nondisplaced C2 facet and lamina fracture. Electronically signed by Sarah Orrin MD. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.

title: Scapular fracture imaging result
description: Left shoulder and humerus radiographs showed a left scapular body fracture.
sourceExcerpt: Patient information. DOB 09/29/1978. DATE OF SERVICE: 02/02/2019. Left shoulder and humerus radiographs showed a left scapular body fracture. Electronically signed by Sarah Orrin MD. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.

title: Grouped medications
description: Medications given during the encounter included hydromorphone, ondansetron, acetaminophen, ketorolac, and Tdap.

title: Transferred to Shannon for higher level care
description: Patient was accepting physician: Dr. Vretis at Shannon ER for higher level of care. Transfer arranged from Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical to Shannon Medical Center.
sourceExcerpt: Patient was accepting physician: Dr. Vretis at Shannon ER for higher level of care. Transfer arranged from Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical to Shannon Medical Center.
